ogTitle: Turrella vs Tweed Heads: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Turrella and Tweed Heads.
heading: Turrella vs Tweed Heads — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Turrella, New South Wales and Tweed Heads, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tweed Heads has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Turrella (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Turrella or Tweed Heads safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Turrella has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Tweed Heads scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Turrella scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Tweed Heads scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Turrella or Tweed Heads?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tweed Heads has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
